title: Leaderboard not loading for IOS applications
excerpt: I am having an issue with multiple users, Guests and admins, not being able to load the leaderboard side of a board on the mobile application on IOS. It will load the blue bar, then the bar will finish and its a never en…

posts.author: Ecoguardpest (D'Angelo)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am having an issue with multiple users, Guests and admins, not being able to load the leaderboard side of a board on the mobile application on IOS. It will load the blue bar, then the bar will finish and its a never ending screen of the leaderboard side refreshing.

It will not show any stats at all. Is anyone else having this issue? Does anyone know a fix to this?

posts.author: discobot (discobot)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi! To find out what I can do, say @discobot display help.
